prompt: Create a dark cinematic anime-style travel camp scene at night in a dense forest, widescreen 16:9 composition. Two travelers rest beside a small campfire: on the left, a petite young girl with short silver-white hair, a red flower hair ornament, a black cloak with deep crimson lining over a white blouse, red ribbon tie, dark tights, and black loafers, sitting on a low stump or stool while holding a plate of food and eating; on the right, a tall adult male knight or mage escort in an ornate black military uniform with gold trim, high collar, brass buttons, leather belts, gloves, tall boots, circular cloak clasps, and a sweeping black cloak lined in burgundy, seated calmly while holding a metal cup and a piece of bread. Both faces are deliberately covered by plain soft-edged beige rectangular censor blocks. In the center foreground, a bright orange campfire burns under a tripod supporting a black cooking pot filled with stew, casting warm light onto the characters and ground. Surround the campsite with travel props: exactly 10 visible camp and travel items including one brass lantern glowing on a wooden crate at far left, one metal cup near it, one loaf of bread on the crate, one cutting board with sliced cured meat, one shallow bowl of food, one stacked wooden chest at right, one rolled bedroll on top of the chest, one leather satchel in the lower right foreground, one sheathed sword leaning beside the luggage, and one horse-drawn carriage in the dark right background with a horse partly visible. The environment is a deep blue-black forest with tall tree trunks, heavy shadows, subtle foliage, and a dirt clearing; lighting should be moody and painterly with strong warm firelight, cool moonlit shadows, detailed textures, high-quality fantasy illustration, dramatic travel-story atmosphere, and no on-image text.
